ItacPersonItem.Notes: The date of the membership is not registered, due to the secretary`s negligence. Also known as `la Filosofa`, she is listed among `les sept merveilles de la République des lettres... de l`Academie des Ricovrati` (De Vertron, La nouvelle Pandore (1698), p. 432).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
